vectors.title: IT Development Services
vectors.content: TINITIATE provides end-to-end software development — web, backend, data engineering, DevOps, and AI/ML solutions. We also offer architecture, maintenance, and support.

vectors.title: IT Training
vectors.content: Hands-on training across Java, Python, SQL, React, Next.js, Cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP), Data Engineering, and DevOps. Includes live projects and mentoring.

vectors.title: Work Experience Program
vectors.content: A 6-month Work Experience Program combining training, real-world projects, mentorship, and deployments for career-ready skills.

vectors.title: Remote Consulting
vectors.content: Remote CTO & Architecture-as-a-Service for startups and businesses. Covers cloud setup, optimization, and data pipelines.

vectors.title: Admissions & Enrollment
vectors.content: To enroll, contact us via our website or WhatsApp +91-95534-95553. We’ll suggest the right course, explain fees, and share start dates.

vectors.title: Corporate Training
vectors.content: Customized upskilling programs for teams — on-site or remote — focused on real-world outcomes and post-training project support.
